IModifierService Methods

One Identity Manager API Server

The IModifierService type exposes the following members.

Methods
  NameDescription
AddEntityModifier
Adds a new entity modifier.
GetColumnModifiers
GetEntityModifiers
Returns the list of entity modifiers.
GetFilterProviders
Returns all registered filter providers for the specified table.
GetFkModifiers
Returns the collection of foreign-key where clauses for foreign key relations pointing to the specified table.
GetMethodConfiguration
GetPropertyModifiers
Returns the collection of property modifiers for the specified table and column.
GetViewConfigProvider
Modify
Applies the registered modifiers to the specified property.
RegisterFilterProvider
Registers a filter provider for the specified table.
RegisterViewConfigProvider
